title: Nothing's Gonna Stop Us Now
why_this_song: Nothing's Gonna Stop Us Now by Starship (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And if this world runs out of lovers
(Nothing's gonna stop us) World runs out of lovers

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nothing's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "nothing's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stop" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "stop" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And all that I want to do

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And if this world runs out of lovers

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Nothing's Gonna Stop Us Now", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Nothing's Gonna Stop Us Now", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Nothing's Gonna Stop Us Now" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Nothing's Gonna Stop Us Now" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Nothing's Gonna Stop Us Now" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Nothing's Gonna Stop Us Now", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
